Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S1.3: Create tenant-scoping server middleware" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Create `server/middleware/tenant.ts` that:
1. Extracts `tenantId` from the authenticated user''s session
2. Attaches `tenantId` to the event context
3. Rejects requests without valid tenant context

## Tasks
- [ ] Create `server/middleware/tenant.ts`
- [ ] Create `server/utils/tenant.ts` — helper to get `tenantId` from event
- [ ] Ensure middleware runs after auth middleware
- [ ] Return 403 if no valid tenant found

## Security
- Every API request must have tenant context
- No data leakage between tenants
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s1,type:security,priority:critical,module:tenant" --milestone "S1: Multi-Tenant Schema & Authentication")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S1.4: Update all existing API routes for tenant filtering" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Update every existing API endpoint to include `tenantId` in all queries.

## Affected Routes
- `GET/POST /api/users/*`
- `GET/PUT /api/roles/*`
- `GET /api/permissions/matrix`

## Tasks
- [ ] Add `eq\(schema.table.tenantId, tenantId\)` to all WHERE clauses
- [ ] Use `getTenantId\(event\)` utility consistently
- [ ] Test that data isolation works \(no cross-tenant data\)
- [ ] Update seed function to scope to default tenant
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s1,type:api,priority:critical,module:tenant" --milestone "S1: Multi-Tenant Schema & Authentication")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S1.5: Install and configure nuxt-auth" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Set up nuxt-auth module for email-based authentication.

## Tasks
- [ ] Install `nuxt-auth` \(or `@sidebase/nuxt-auth`\) package
- [ ] Configure in `nuxt.config.ts`
- [ ] Add password hash column to `users` table \(argon2 or bcrypt\)
- [ ] Create session management \(secure httpOnly cookies\)
- [ ] Configure session expiry and refresh

## Security Requirements
- httpOnly, secure, sameSite cookies
- Password hashed with argon2/bcrypt
- Session token rotation on login
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s1,type:feature,priority:critical,module:auth" --milestone "S1: Multi-Tenant Schema & Authentication")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S1.6: Create login page and auth API endpoints" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Build the login page \(German UI\) and auth API endpoints.

## API Endpoints
- `POST /api/auth/login` — validate email/password, create session
- `POST /api/auth/logout` — destroy session, clear cookie
- `GET /api/auth/me` — return current user + role + permissions + tenant

## Frontend
- `pages/login.vue` — Login form \(Email, Passwort, Anmelden button\)
- German labels and error messages
- Redirect to dashboard after successful login
- Show error on invalid credentials

## Tasks
- [ ] Create login API endpoint with Zod validation
- [ ] Create logout API endpoint
- [ ] Create me API endpoint \(returns user + permissions\)
- [ ] Create login page with Nuxt UI form components
- [ ] Handle loading states and error messages
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s1,type:feature,type:ui,priority:critical,module:auth" --milestone "S1: Multi-Tenant Schema & Authentication")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S1.7: Auth middleware + CASL integration" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Create server auth middleware and connect CASL to real user sessions.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create `server/middleware/auth.ts` — verify session token on every API request
- [ ] Update `app/plugins/casl.ts` — load permissions from `/api/auth/me` \(replace hardcoded superadmin\)
- [ ] Activate `app/middleware/acl.global.ts` — redirect to `/login` if not authenticated
- [ ] Protect all `/admin/*` routes \(require admin role\)
- [ ] Add `useAuth\(\)` composable for frontend session state
- [ ] Create password reset flow \(token-based, optional for S1\)

## Security
- No API route accessible without valid session \(except `/api/auth/login`\)
- CASL ability rebuilt from DB on each page load
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s1,type:security,priority:critical,module:auth" --milestone "S1: Multi-Tenant Schema & Authentication")

Bash("$GH" issue list --state open --limit 100 --json number,title --jq '.[] | ""#\\\(.number\) \\\(.title\)""')

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S2.1: Tenant CRUD API and management page" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Create tenant management API endpoints and admin UI page \(superadmin only\).

## API Endpoints
- `GET /api/tenants` — List all tenants \(superadmin\)
- `POST /api/tenants` — Create tenant + seed default roles
- `GET /api/tenants/[id]` — Tenant details
- `PUT /api/tenants/[id]` — Update tenant \(name, branding, isActive\)

## Frontend
- `pages/admin/mandanten.vue` — Tenant management page
- Tenant branding: primaryColor, logo applied via CSS variables

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Superadmin can create, view, edit tenants
- [ ] Default roles seeded on tenant creation
- [ ] Tenant branding \(color, logo\) configurable
- [ ] Non-superadmin cannot access tenant management
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s2,type:feature,type:api,type:ui,module:tenant,priority:critical" --milestone "S2: Tenant Management & Security Hardening")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S2.2: Input validation with Zod schemas" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Add Zod validation to every API endpoint for security and data integrity.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create `server/utils/validate.ts` — shared validation helper
- [ ] Define Zod schemas for all existing endpoints \(users, roles, permissions\)
- [ ] Validate all request bodies and query parameters
- [ ] Return standardized 400 errors with field-level details
- [ ] No endpoint accepts unvalidated input

## Security
- Prevents malformed data from reaching database
- Protects against injection via unexpected field types
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s2,type:security,type:infra,priority:critical" --milestone "S2: Tenant Management & Security Hardening")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S2.3: Shared server utilities \(pagination, response, query builders\)" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Create reusable server utilities used by ALL API endpoints.

## Utilities
- `server/utils/paginate.ts` — Cursor-based pagination helper
- `server/utils/response.ts` — Standardized response format `{ data, meta, error }`
- `server/utils/query.ts` — Reusable query builders: withPagination, withTenant, withSort

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All list endpoints use cursor-based pagination
- [ ] Consistent response format across all APIs
- [ ] No unbounded queries \(every list has max limit\)
- [ ] Pagination includes: cursor, hasMore, total count
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s2,type:shared,type:infra,priority:high" --milestone "S2: Tenant Management & Security Hardening")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S2.4: Rate limiting and audit log table" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Add rate limiting middleware and audit logging infrastructure.

## Rate Limiting
- Configurable per endpoint type \(strict on auth, relaxed on reads\)
- Return 429 with Retry-After header

## Audit Log
- Create `audit_logs` table \(tenantId, userId, action, entity, entityId, oldValues, newValues, ipAddress, createdAt\)
- Create `server/utils/audit.ts` — logging utility
- Log critical actions: user CRUD, role changes, login/logout, permission changes

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Rate limiting active on auth endpoints
- [ ] Audit log table created
- [ ] Critical actions logged
- [ ] Audit utility easy to use in any endpoint
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s2,type:security,priority:high" --milestone "S2: Tenant Management & Security Hardening")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S4.1: Contact database schema" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Tables

### contacts
id, tenantId, firstName, lastName, email, phone, mobile, company, position, address, city, zip, country, tags \(JSON\), source, leadId \(FK→leads\), assignedTo \(FK→users\), notes, createdAt, updatedAt

### contact_activities
id, tenantId, contactId \(FK→contacts\), userId, type, description, createdAt

## Indexes
- \(tenantId, email\) — for duplicate detection
- \(tenantId, company\) — company grouping
- \(tenantId, assignedTo\)
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s4,type:schema,priority:critical,module:contacts" --milestone "S4: Contact Management")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S4.2: Contact CRUD API + duplicate detection" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Endpoints
- `GET /api/contacts` — Paginated, search \(name, email, company\), filters
- `POST /api/contacts` — Create with duplicate detection \(email match warning\)
- `GET /api/contacts/[id]` — Detail with unified timeline \(calls, emails, deals, tasks\)
- `PUT /api/contacts/[id]` — Update
- `DELETE /api/contacts/[id]` — Delete \(check linked deals first, warn\)
- `GET /api/contacts/[id]/timeline` — Aggregated activity from all modules
- `POST /api/contacts/merge` — Merge duplicate contacts

## Requirements
- Duplicate detection on create \(same email in same tenant\)
- Unified timeline aggregates data from multiple tables
- All queries tenant-scoped with pagination
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s4,type:api,priority:critical,module:contacts" --milestone "S4: Contact Management")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S4.3: Contact frontend pages" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Pages
- `pages/contacts/index.vue` — Contact list \(reuse DataTable component\)
- `pages/contacts/[id].vue` — Contact detail with unified timeline
- `pages/contacts/new.vue` — Create form with duplicate warning

## Components
- Contact card component \(mini profile view, reusable in deal/lead pages\)
- Company grouping view \(contacts grouped by company\)

## Features
- Unified timeline shows calls, emails, deals, tasks
- Duplicate detection warning on create/edit
- Contact linked to lead \(if converted\)
- German UI \(de-DE\)
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s4,type:ui,priority:critical,module:contacts" --milestone "S4: Contact Management")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S7.1: Azure AD app registration + OAuth flow" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Set up Azure AD application for Microsoft Graph API access.

## Tasks
- [ ] Register Azure AD application
- [ ] Configure OAuth 2.0 permissions \(Calls.Initiate, Presence.Read, Calendars.ReadWrite\)
- [ ] Implement OAuth consent flow for users
- [ ] Store tokens securely \(encrypted in NuxtHub KV\)
- [ ] Create `server/utils/graph.ts` — Microsoft Graph API client utility
- [ ] Token refresh mechanism
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s7,type:infra,priority:critical,module:teams-integration" --milestone "S7: Microsoft Teams Integration")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S7.2: Click-to-call + call status via Teams" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Endpoints
- `POST /api/calls/teams/dial` — Initiate Teams call via Graph API
- `GET /api/calls/teams/status` — Get active call status

## Frontend
- Click-to-call button component on contact/lead pages
- Call status indicator \(ringing, connected, ended\)
- Post-call outcome form \(Reached, Voicemail, NoAnswer, Callback\)
- `composables/useTeamsCall.ts` — Teams calling composable
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s7,type:feature,priority:critical,module:teams-integration" --milestone "S7: Microsoft Teams Integration")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S7.3: Teams presence status display" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Show Teams presence status for contacts in CRM.

## Features
- Fetch presence via Microsoft Graph API
- Display indicator: Available \(green\), Busy \(red\), Away \(yellow\), Offline \(gray\)
- Show on contact cards and lead pages
- Cache presence data \(short TTL via NuxtHub KV\) to reduce API calls
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s7,type:feature,priority:medium,module:teams-integration" --milestone "S7: Microsoft Teams Integration")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S8.1: Call log system \(schema + API + UI\)" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### call_logs
id, tenantId, contactId \(FK→contacts\), userId \(FK→users\), direction \(Inbound/Outbound\), outcome \(Reached/Voicemail/NoAnswer/Callback/Busy\), duration \(integer, seconds\), startedAt, endedAt, notes, teamsCallId, createdAt

## API
- Full CRUD + list by contact + list by user + daily statistics
- Paginated and tenant-scoped

## UI
- `pages/calls/index.vue` — Call log list with filters \(date, user, outcome\)
- Call statistics widget \(calls today, avg duration, success rate\)
- Daily call target tracking per caller

## Features
- Caller dashboard shows today''s calls vs target
- Quick log form after Teams call ends
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s8,type:feature,priority:critical" --milestone "S8: Call Logging & Email Threads")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S8.2: Email thread tracking" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### email_threads
id, tenantId, contactId \(FK→contacts\), subject, lastMessageAt, messageCount, status

### email_messages
id, threadId \(FK→email_threads\), direction \(Inbound/Outbound\), fromAddress, toAddress, subject, bodyPreview, sentAt

## API
- List threads by contact \(paginated\)
- Thread detail with messages

## UI
- Email thread view on contact detail page \(part of unified timeline\)
- Future: Microsoft Graph webhook for automatic email sync
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s8,type:feature,priority:high" --milestone "S8: Call Logging & Email Threads")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S9.1: Dashboard widget system + data API" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Components
- StatCard — Single KPI with trend indicator
- BarChart, LineChart, PieChart — Chart widgets
- RecentList — Latest items \(leads, deals, calls\)
- PipelineWidget — Visual pipeline summary

## Composable
- `composables/useDashboard.ts` — Data fetching and state management

## API
- `GET /api/reports/dashboard` — Aggregated metrics \(tenant-scoped, role-aware\)
- Efficient aggregation queries \(GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM — no N+1\)
- Cached results for expensive computations
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s9,type:feature,type:shared,priority:critical,module:reports" --milestone "S9: Role-Specific Dashboards")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S9.2: Role-specific dashboard pages" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Pages
- `pages/dashboard/index.vue` — Route to role-appropriate dashboard
- `pages/dashboard/sales.vue` — Pipeline value, deals won/lost, conversion rate, open deals, tasks
- `pages/dashboard/calls.vue` — Calls today vs target, success rate, contact queue, callbacks
- `pages/dashboard/management.vue` — Team comparison, revenue forecast, pending approvals

## Requirements
- Each role sees only their relevant dashboard
- Dashboard data loads efficiently \(< 3 seconds\)
- Responsive layout \(mobile-friendly\)
- German UI \(de-DE\)
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s9,type:ui,priority:critical,module:reports" --milestone "S9: Role-Specific Dashboards")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S9.3: Team management \(schema + API + UI\)" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### teams
id, tenantId, name, leaderId \(FK→users\), createdAt

### team_members
id, tenantId, teamId \(FK→teams\), userId \(FK→users\)
Unique: \(teamId, userId\)

## API
- Team CRUD + add/remove members + list members
- Team-based filtering on dashboards and reports

## UI
- `pages/admin/teams.vue` — Team management page
- Team leads can view their team''s data
- Team filter dropdown on dashboards
- German UI
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s9,type:feature,priority:high" --milestone "S9: Role-Specific Dashboards")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S11.1: Campaign management \(schema + API + UI\)" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### campaigns
id, tenantId, name, type \(Email/Phone/Mixed\), status \(Draft/Active/Paused/Completed\), startDate, endDate, budget, createdAt, updatedAt

### campaign_leads
id, campaignId \(FK→campaigns\), leadId \(FK→leads\), status, convertedAt

## API
- CRUD + add/remove leads + campaign performance metrics
- Lead-to-campaign attribution tracking

## UI
- `pages/campaigns/index.vue` — Campaign list
- `pages/campaigns/[id].vue` — Campaign detail with lead tracking
- German UI
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s11,type:feature,priority:critical" --milestone "S11: Campaigns & Newsletter")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S11.2: Newsletter system with templates" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### newsletters
id, tenantId, campaignId \(FK→campaigns\), subject, body, template, scheduledAt, sentAt, status

### newsletter_recipients
id, newsletterId \(FK→newsletters\), contactId \(FK→contacts\), email, status, openedAt, clickedAt, unsubscribedAt

## Features
- Template editor with predefined templates + variable placeholders
- Batch email sending via provider
- Open/click tracking
- Unsubscribe management \(respect opt-out\)
- Scheduled sending

## UI
- `pages/campaigns/[id]/newsletter.vue` — Newsletter editor + send
- Template preview
- Recipient list management
- German UI
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s11,type:feature,priority:high" --milestone "S11: Campaigns & Newsletter")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S12.1: In-app notification system" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### notifications
id, tenantId, userId \(FK→users\), type, title, message, relatedType, relatedId, isRead \(boolean\), createdAt

## API
- `GET /api/notifications` — User''s notifications \(paginated\)
- `PUT /api/notifications/[id]` — Mark as read
- `PUT /api/notifications/read-all` — Mark all as read

## UI
- Notification bell in navbar with unread count badge
- Notification dropdown with recent items
- Real-time updates via SSE or short polling
- Click notification → navigate to related entity
- German UI
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s12,type:feature,priority:critical" --milestone "S12: Automation & Notifications")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S12.2: Workflow automation engine" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### automations
id, tenantId, name, trigger \(text\), conditions \(JSON\), actions \(JSON\), isActive \(boolean\), createdAt

## Triggers
LeadCreated, DealStageChanged, TaskOverdue, CallCompleted, TicketCreated

## Actions
CreateTask, SendNotification, AssignUser, ChangeStatus, SendEmail

## Implementation
- `server/utils/automation.ts` — Automation runner \(evaluate triggers, check conditions, execute actions\)
- Hook into relevant API endpoints \(lead create, deal update, etc.\)

## UI
- `pages/admin/automations.vue` — Rule management \(create, edit, toggle active\)
- Visual trigger → condition → action builder
- German UI
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s12,type:feature,priority:high" --milestone "S12: Automation & Notifications")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S13.1: Calendar events \(schema + API + UI\)" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Schema
### calendar_events
id, tenantId, title, description, startAt, endAt, type \(Meeting/Call/FollowUp/Deadline\), relatedType, relatedId, userId \(FK→users\), location, isAllDay \(boolean\), externalId, createdAt, updatedAt

## API
- CRUD + list by date range + list by user + list by related entity

## UI
- `pages/calendar/index.vue` — Monthly/weekly/daily calendar view
- Create events from lead/contact/deal pages
- Event detail modal
- German UI
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s13,type:feature,priority:critical" --milestone "S13: Calendar & External Sync")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S13.2: Microsoft calendar sync" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Bidirectional sync between CRM and Microsoft Outlook/Teams calendar.

## Features
- Create in CRM → appears in Outlook \(and vice versa\)
- Use `externalId` to track synced events
- Webhook subscription for real-time Microsoft updates
- Reminder notifications before events \(15 min, 1 hour configurable\)

## Technical
- Microsoft Graph Calendar API
- OAuth tokens from S7 Azure AD setup
- Sync conflict resolution \(last-write-wins\)
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s13,type:feature,priority:high,module:teams-integration" --milestone "S13: Calendar & External Sync")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S14.1: Database performance optimization" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Tasks
- [ ] Audit all database indexes — add missing for common query patterns
- [ ] Implement NuxtHub KV caching: roles, permissions, tenant config, deal stages
- [ ] Query performance audit: identify and fix N+1 queries
- [ ] Optimize slow aggregations \(dashboard, reports\)
- [ ] Add EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN checks for critical queries
- [ ] Ensure all list endpoints have proper pagination limits
- [ ] Lazy load all page components
- [ ] Image optimization \(logos, avatars\)
EOF
\)" --label "sprint:s14,type:infra,priority:critical" --milestone "S14: Performance, Polish & Launch Prep")

Bash("$GH" issue create --title "S14.2: Audit log viewer page" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Description
Admin page to view all audit log entries.

## Features
- `pages/admin/audit-log.vue` — Audit log viewer \(admin only\)
- Filterable by: action, user, entity type, date range
